artifacts.role: generic PHP class printer now supports AllowDynamicProperties metadata
typed shell metadata for the compiler-emitted WP_Http_Encoding adapter
WPHX PHP compile fixture for wp-includes/class-wp-http-encoding.php
WPHX-312.50 oracle/candidate manifest using the compiler-emitted original-path public shell
behavior receipt for the retired temporary shell candidate

claims: WPHX PHP emits the original-path wp-includes/class-wp-http-encoding.php public class adapter for WP_Http_Encoding.
The WPHX-312.50 candidate no longer copies and patches a public PHP class shell for promoted encoding methods.

PHP still owns public accept_encoding function_exists checks and wp_http_accept_encoding filter timing while Haxe owns bounded compression/decompression, compatibility inflate, content-encoding, should-decode, and availability helpers.
non_claims: This does not claim live HTTP transfer-encoding negotiation or streaming transport behavior.
This does not claim installed WordPress distribution behavior or selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit parity for WP_Http_Encoding.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
